title: EventEnvelope
description: Shared envelope for every event published to the logistics.events exchange.

eventId.description: Globally unique id for this event instance.

eventType.description: Dotted event type, matches the RabbitMQ routing key.

eventVersion.description: Schema version of the event payload. Additive changes bump minor.

producer.description: Name of the producing service (e.g., order-service).

data.description: Event-specific payload. Validated against the eventType+eventVersion.
